allow: PowerShell($env:ENVIRONMENT="sandbox"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'src'\); from integration.api import main; print\('API imports OK:', main.app.title\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; docker compose up -d 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { $h = docker inspect --format '{{.State.Health.Status}}' autotask_ghl_db 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } while \($h -ne 'healthy' -and \(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); $h; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\alembic.exe upgrade head 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","integration.api.main:app","--app-dir","src","--port","8000" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); $ok=$false; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/health -TimeoutSec 2; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\($ok\){ $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)
